description.value: Aura moderate transmutation; Slot none; CL 6th; Weight 5 lbs.; Price 37,550 gp DESCRIPTION The gold-washed barrel of this elegant double-barreled pistol always catches the light, and its maple grip feels pleasantly warm to the touch. When the wielder of this +2 double-barreled pistol successfully bypasses an evil creature’s damage reduction with a single attack, the creature’s skin cracks into fissures of golden light. This light negates the creature’s DR for the gunslinger and her allies, fading away after 1 minute. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Magic Arms and Armor; Spells versatile weapon; Cost 19,800 gp
